meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't scale projects (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't scale projects. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Scale Your Freelance SaaS Projects
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale. Master Claude Code skills setup with this advanced checklist for freelancers. Build faster, impress clients, and automate workflows.
content.answer_block: To scale your freelance output, you must transition from manual coding to an AI-orchestrated workflow. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you create a high-leverage feedback loop that automates boilerplate, enforces architectural standards, and allows you to ship complex SaaS features in hours rather than days.
content.intro:
The freelance ceiling is real. You’re trading hours for dollars, fighting scope creep, and drowning in technical debt while trying to maintain quality. The moment your project complexity spikes, your velocity hits a wall. You aren't failing; you're just using the wrong stack for the modern AI-native era.

It’s time to move beyond manual script-writing. By mastering Claude Code skills and leveraging Antigravity, you transform your CLI into a force multiplier. This isn't just about code generation; it's about architecting a system that handles the heavy lifting so you can focus on high-value client strategy and rapid iteration.

steps.title: Environment Orchestration
steps.description: Initialize your project workspace to ensure Claude Code has full context of your architectural patterns before writing a single line.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this repository and generate a structured project map. Define the core architectural principles, naming conventions, and dependency management strategy to be used for all future feature additions.

steps.title: Automated Boilerplate Injection
steps.description: Eliminate repetitive setup tasks by creating a blueprint that Claude Code follows to maintain consistency across client projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a standardized module template including error handling, logging, and type-safe interfaces based on the project map generated in step 1.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Generate module template based on project standards'

steps.title: Context-Aware Refactoring
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform deep refactoring without breaking dependencies, ensuring your codebase remains scalable as features evolve.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current module structure and suggest refactorings to decouple the business logic from the API layer to improve testability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Refactor the data access layer to follow the repository pattern'

steps.title: Automated Test Suite Generation
steps.description: Ensure reliability by forcing Claude Code to generate unit tests for every new feature before it is committed to the main branch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of integration tests for the newly created module, covering edge cases and potential failure points in the business logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Generate and execute unit tests for all new functions'

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Hardening
steps.description: Automate the transition from local development to production by configuring Claude Code to validate build integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the CI/CD pipeline and suggest improvements for faster deployment times and automated rollback triggers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review deployment configuration and suggest hardening steps'

pro_tips: Always use a custom .claudeignore file to prevent the agent from indexing massive node_modules or build artifacts, saving tokens and speeding up context ingestion.
Use 'claude ask' to perform architectural reviews before implementation; treat the AI as a senior lead developer, not just a code generator.
Chain your prompts: use Antigravity to define the 'What' and 'Why', then use Claude Code to execute the 'How'.
Keep your conversation context short. If the project gets too large, summarize the current state and start a fresh session to keep the agent focused.
Inject your client's specific brand/coding style guide into the system prompt to ensure the output requires zero manual styling adjustments.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project folder for technical debt, then run the environment orchestration step to establish your new baseline. Once stable, start migrating one module at a time using the automated refactoring flow.
content.conversion_block: Stop building the hard way and start scaling your freelance business with the precision of an AI-augmented team. Your clients deserve faster delivery, and you deserve a more efficient workflow. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
